chatbot.title: Aria
chatbot.subtitle: Your Project Ledger assistant
chatbot.greetingSubtitle: Your financial assistant. Ask me about your projects, expenses, or reports
chatbot.unavailable: The assistant is not available right now. Try again in a few minutes
chatbot.errorMessage: An error occurred while processing your message. Please try again
chatbot.premiumRequired: This feature requires a paid plan
chatbot.welcomeBody: I can help you with information about your projects, income, expenses, and more.
chatbot.welcomeExamplesLabel: For example, you can ask me:
chatbot.welcomeExample1: What is the current balance of project X?
chatbot.welcomeExample2: How much has been spent this month?
